LARP RADAR

The community you need to find the best larp events around Europe.

SIGNUP

Larp events around Europe

Organizations who host awesome events

+0

Active users

Feel the
Larp Radar

With us, you can discover new events throughout Europe, connect with other enthusiasts, and share your experience. Whether you're a veteran or a newcomer, on Larp Radar you'll always find the perfect game for you.

With our interactive map and vibrant community, you can uncover events in lesser-known locations that you may have never discovered otherwise.

Find your next Larp

By larper
for larper

Created by larpers, for larpers. Our site is designed to bring together larp enthusiasts, providing a platform to connect, explore upcoming events, and share the love for this immersive passion.

Filter by
category

Discover a wide range of larp games for all tastes: fantasy adventures, historical simulations, horror events, and sci-fi experiences. There's something for everyone in our larp community!

Your Perfect
Quest Beacon

Larp Radar is your go-to resource for choosing your next larp event! Dive into player reviews, browse captivating photos, and find all the information you need to embark on your next thrilling adventure.

Hot Larps

We are proud to present the hottest larp of the moment!
We are constantly updated on the best larp events in Europe and have compiled a list of the most popular ones among our users. Here you will find the most reviewed larp and the latest news, which will help you choose the next event to attend. Discover what makes these larp so special and unique, and get ready for an unforgettable gaming experience!

We are an inclusive and respectful community

that is committed to creating a peaceful environment for all members. To ensure harmonious collaboration, we have some rules that must be respected by all Larp Radar users. Click here to read the community rules and help us create a positive experience for everyone.
